rows.label: tlk70000059_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Ever fought a monster you
know, but it somehow felt
tougher than usual?

rows.label: tlk70000059_01_msg0002
rows.name:
In that case, you should look
at your elements and each
other's opposing attributes.

rows.label: tlk70000059_01_msg0003
rows.name:
If your element is fire and
the enemy's is water, you'll
take more damage than usual!

rows.label: tlk70000059_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Elements can easily spell the
difference between victory and
defeat, so pay close attention to 'em!
